entries.value: Target on-time delivery rate is >95%. Industry leaders achieve 98%+. Below 93% signals carrier issues, late fulfillment, or unrealistic SLA promises. Track by carrier and service level separately.
Target warehouse space utilization is 80-85%. Below 70% means wasted rent. Above 90% causes congestion, slower picking, and safety hazards. Measure by cubic feet, not just floor space.
Target order accuracy (correct items, correct quantity) is >99.5%. Below 99% is critical — each error costs $10-50 in returns processing, reshipping, and customer goodwill. Track by picker and shift.

Average shipping cost per order depends on weight and zone. Benchmark: $5-8 for ground <2 lbs, $8-15 for ground 2-10 lbs. Negotiate volume discounts quarterly. Cost creep above 12% of order value is a red flag.
Target receiving cycle time (arrival to put-away complete) is <24 hours. Express inbound should be <4 hours. Cycle time above 48 hours delays inventory availability and creates stockout risk.

Target pick rate is 100-150 units per labor hour for single-item orders, 60-80 for multi-item. Pack rate: 40-60 orders per hour. Below these thresholds, review warehouse layout, slotting, and batch picking strategy.

Alert when any SKU's available quantity drops below its reorder point. Critical alert when available hits zero with pending fulfillment orders. Stockouts cost 3-5x more in lost sales than carrying extra inventory.

Escalate any shipment in 'exception' status for more than 24 hours. File carrier claim for shipments not scanned within 48 hours of pickup. Customer notification required for any delivery delay >2 days.

Cycle count high-velocity SKUs weekly, medium monthly, low quarterly. Full physical count annually. Variance tolerance: 1% by value for A items, 3% for B, 5% for C. Investigate any single SKU variance >5 units immediately.
Never route more than 60% of volume through a single carrier. Maintain at least 3 active carriers. Quarterly carrier scorecards on cost, transit time, damage rate, and claim resolution speed.
